# Stacking Rules

At Acme Shop, customers are encouraged to use promotional codes to maximize savings, but there are specific stacking rules in place. Generally, only one promotional code can be used per order, though there are exceptions where combining certain codes, such as free shipping with specific product discounts, is permitted if eligibility criteria are met. It's essential to enter all eligible codes at checkout, as the system will apply the best possible discounts, and customer service is available to assist with any questions within 14 days of purchase. Promotional codes cannot be applied retroactively, so ensuring accuracy before order completion is crucial.

[Source: promo_codes.md#stacking-rules]
